mapper.sql: id, real_name, teacher_num, entry_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select:
select t.id, t.real_name as realName, t.teacher_num as teacherNum, t.entry_date as entryDate, group_concat(concat(ifnull(c.grade_year, ''), ifnull(c.name, '')) order by c.grade_year, c.name) as teachingClass from user_teacher t left join class_teacher ct on ct.teacher_id = t.id and ct.is_current = 1 left join edu_unit c on c.id = ct.class_id and c.delflag = 0 and c.type = ${@cloud.ciky.business.enums.EduUnitTypeEnum@CLASS.getValue()} where t.delflag = 0
and (t.real_name like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%') or t.teacher_num like concat('%', #{query.keywords}, '%'))
group by t.id order by t.create_time desc

select t.id as teacher_id, t.real_name as teacher_real_name, t.teacher_num, t.entry_date, u.id as user_id, u.username, u.nickname, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.user_type, u.phone, u.email from dm_business.user_teacher t left join dm_system.sys_user u on u.business_user_id = t.id and u.delflag = 0 and u.user_type = ${@cloud.ciky.system.enums.UserTypeEnum@TEACHER.getValue()} where t.id = #{id} and t.delflag = 0
